title: cistanthe maritima
intro: Cistanthe maritima, also known as purple sea onion or sea squill, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Montiaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In terms of health benefits, it has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, as well as to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin issues. Cistanthe maritima is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
